title: Freshly Fried Vietnamese Pork Bun Cha
description: A funky and crispy Vietnamese dish featuring rice paper sheets and pork, perfect for a date night, served in a stone bowl dolsot on a lazy susan spinner.
instructions: Slice the pork shoulder into thin strips and marinate in grilled pork marinade for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the marinated pork to the skillet and cook until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside on a paper towel lined plate.
In the same skillet, add the fish sauce and lime juice and stir to combine.
Add the pickled carrots to the skillet and stir to combine.
Arrange the rice paper sheets on a large plate or platter.
Add the cooked pork to the rice paper sheets and top with pickled carrots and chopped cilantro.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately in a stone bowl dolsot on a lazy susan spinner.
